name: webtalk_init
short_description: Initialize webtalk for use by an external client.
full_help:
webtalk_init

Description: 
Initialize webtalk for use by an external client.

Syntax: 
webtalk_init  [-webtalk_dir <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-webtalk_dir]  Directory that webtalk can use for temporary files. Must 
                  exist and be writable.
                  Default: current working directory
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

Suspend message limits during command execution
